name: Xinxiang Chemical Fiber Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinxiang Chemical Fiber Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes textile raw materials in China and internationally. Its products include cellulose filament and spandex yarns; and photochromic, thermochromic, intellectualized thermoregulation, bamboo, protein, and aloe fibers. The company exports its products to approximately 30 countries and regions, such as Germany, Italy, Japan, South Korea, and India. Xinxiang Chemical Fiber Co., Ltd. is based in Xinxiang, China. Xinxiang Chemical Fiber Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Xinxiang Bailu Investment Group Co., Ltd.
